arts.ttl: Preview: Montpellier HSC vs. Rennes - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Ligue 1 clash between Montpellier HSC and Rennes, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

Montpellier HSC host Stade Rennais at the Stade de la Mosson for Matchday 24 of Ligue 1. Both teams are aiming to climb the table, making this a crucial clash. Montpellier, currently 18th with 15 p...
